allow: Bash(git commit -m 'fix: AI prompt demands single words, parser flags spaced entries specifically *)
Bash(git commit -m 'feature: Clear All button for the word list with a 5-second undo *)
Bash(git commit -m 'engine: word search direction vectors + auto-grow to fit every word *)
Bash(git commit -m 'safety: word search filler profanity filter — 8-direction scan + regen *)
Bash(git commit -m 'design: drop footer version/offline badge; bridge Generate to AI Words *)
Bash(git commit -m 'chore: cleanup — wire the seed-copied checkmark that could never show *)
Bash(perl -i -ne 'if \($. == 101\) { print "    text = text.normalize\(q\(NFD\)\).replace\(/[\\\\u0300-\\\\u036f]/g, q\(\)\);\\n" } else { print }' src/logic/language.ts)
